name: Fallert Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: Perryville, Ste. Genevieve area school districts (MO); 28 government contracts totaling ~$411K
recent_news: Truck-collision incident reported 2022 (Ste. Genevieve Herald); long-tenured local operator since 1953 with continued small-town contracts
website: none confirmed (listed on Yellow Pages, Chamber, BrokerSnapshot)
fit_notes: Multi-generational small Missouri family operator (founded 1953) serving Perryville/Ste. Genevieve rural districts. Sub-scale (~37 EEs, ~$1.1M est. rev) but classic succession-era tuck-in candidate for Summit's MO footprint; manager-only public presence suggests aging principals.

name: ABC Transportation LLC
fleet_size_est: small (sub-15 buses; ~12 EEs implies handful of routes)
districts_or_customers: Reportedly serves Howard County (MD) school routes per BBB profile; Frankford DE address (near Indian River SD) per source data — possible dual-state op or data conflation
recent_news: No M&A or sale news identified; 24-yr-old small contractor with A+ BBB rating; not BBB-accredited
website: americanbuildings.com listed in source is incorrect; no confirmed company website
fit_notes: Very small owner-operated route contractor (Ashwell Jr.). Potential Mid-Atlantic tuck-in but sub-scale; address/state ambiguity (DE listing vs MD BBB profile) warrants direct outreach to confirm operating geography and contracts before pursuing.

name: Jump On The School Bus
owner_or_parent: Sierra Bravo Enterprises LLC (Darin & Sierra Falso-Fiechter)
districts_or_customers: Wedding parties, wine/beer tours, corporate events, holiday light tours — NOT school district contracts
recent_news: Active CPUC charter-party license PSG0028446 (exp. 7/21/2027); continues as Santa Barbara-area special-event charter operator
fit_notes: NOT A TUCK-IN TARGET. Despite the name, this is a charter/wedding-tour company using painted yellow school buses for adult events around Santa Barbara wine country. No home-to-school district contracts, no SPED/NEMT work. Exclude from Summit pipeline.

name: Amboy Bus Co

fleet_size_est: unknown (~295 EEs and $13.3M rev in source seem high for a Rochester local — possibly conflated with NYC Amboy)
districts_or_customers: Source lists Rochester NY address (120 Primrose St, 14615); no confirming hits in Rochester transportation directories. Greece CSD & Rochester CSD list other contractors (First Student, Monroe, Ontario Bus). NYC-area Amboy Bus Co (Brooklyn/Staten Island, est. 1979) was part of Atlantic Express family that ceased ops in 2018.

fit_notes: Significant data quality concern. The Rochester NY address does not match any verifiable school-bus contractor; the well-known Amboy Bus (NYC) is defunct since 2018. Source row may be stale/erroneous. Recommend phone verification before any outreach; do not advance without confirming the entity actually operates.

name: Town Bus
owner_or_parent: Beacon Mobility (Audax Private Equity portfolio company); now further consolidated under Van Pool Transportation / AG Van Pool Holdings per 2025 STB filing
fleet_size_est: Towne Bus LLC operates ~390 vehicles (combined within WE Transport family)
districts_or_customers: Long Island school districts (Nassau & Suffolk) including parochial/private, wheelchair-bound and pre-K SPED riders — 50+ years of LI school transportation history
recent_news: WE Transport (parent of Towne Bus Corp.) acquired by Beacon Mobility (Audax) in 2021; June 2025 STB decision approved Van Pool Transportation / Ag Van Pool Holdings acquisition of control over Towne Bus, WE Transport and affiliates — further PE consolidation
fit_notes: NOT A TUCK-IN TARGET. Town/Towne Bus Corp at 55 Babylon Tpke Freeport is part of WE Transport, an Audax/Beacon Mobility PE-owned platform (and 2025 STB-approved consolidation with Van Pool). Owned by a direct competitor PE platform — exclude from Summit pipeline.
